scope: single-seed 1/4/16-state exact memorization scaling audit; the completed 64-state failure is referenced without retraining; no production change or later Gate

training.independent_initialization: each panel restores the same seed-5914 initial state

decision_rule.one_state_fail: inspect the forward/vector-head/loss basis; do not change training budget
decision_rule.one_state_pass_larger_fail: the implementation chain works but shared structural memorization scales poorly; qualify one compact representation or preconditioning change before training
decision_rule.all_pass: return to full-time resampling on fixed endpoints under a separately frozen protocol
decision_rule.boundary: No panel may receive extra steps or a new seed. This audit cannot initialize production or authorize H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
